name: rollout_campaign_summary
primary_question: What bounded campaign cadence posture is represented by the committed 8Dionysus owner-example chain without turning stats into current cadence authority?
derivation_rule: derive one committed reference summary from the 8Dionysus rollout-campaign, drift-review, and rollback-followthrough examples without claiming freshness against current checked-in history
authority_ceiling: Weaker than source-owned campaign cadence and review decisions.
